community.title: Community Wall
community.subtitle: Share your journey anonymously. You are not alone.
community.placeholder: Share a thought, a win, or just say hi...
community.empty: No posts yet. Be the first to share!
community.report_confirm_text: Are you sure you want to report this post? It will be hidden from your feed.

welcome.title: Welcome to Aman
welcome.text: Your confidential companion for the journey ahead. We are here to support you every step of the way.

programs.title: Structured Programs
programs.text: Enroll in 90-day structured paths built on clinical evidence to help you reach your goals.

ai.title: AI Support 24/7
ai.text: Compassionate, non-judgmental support whenever you need it, stored safely on your device.

tracking.title: Track Your Growth
tracking.text: Visualize your progress, log your moods, and celebrate every milestone in your recovery.

cta.title: Ready to Start?
cta.text: Join over 200,000 lives impacted by our legacy of care. Your privacy is our priority.

offline.chat_message: You are currently offline. Chat is unavailable.
offline.feature_unavailable: This feature is unavailable while offline. Please reconnect to the internet.

language_modal.title: Welcome to Aman Digital Care
language_modal.subtitle: Please select your language to continue.

crisis.title: Immediate Support
crisis.subtitle: If you are in immediate distress, please use the resources below. You are not alone.
crisis.find_helpline_description: Connect with a free, confidential helpline in your country for immediate support.
crisis.lifeline_description: Free, confidential support for people in distress. Available 24/7 in the US and Canada.
crisis.textline_description: Connect with a volunteer Crisis Counselor for free, 24/7. Text HOME to 741741 from anywhere in the US.
crisis.chat_ai: Start a Crisis Chat with AMAN AI
crisis.chat_description: Our AI is trained to provide immediate, calming support. A high-priority alert will be triggered.

hero.title: Your Safe Space for Healing & Growth
hero.subtitle: Aman Digital Care is a free, confidential AI companion designed to support you on your journey through addiction and mental health challenges.

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.subtitle: Rooted in Kindness
mission.p1: Our mission is to provide a safe, non-judgmental space for healing for everyone, everywhere.
mission.p2: We believe in empowering you with tools that stay private on your device.

contact.title: Get in Touch
contact.subtitle: We're here to help with technical support or partnership inquiries.

success.title: Message Sent
success.message: Thank you! We will get back to you as soon as possible.

profile.title: My Profile
profile.subtitle: Manage your recovery data and account preferences.
profile.anonymous_text: You are currently using the app anonymously. Log in to sync your data across devices.
profile.email_invalid_error: Please enter a valid Email ID.

data_management.title: Data & Privacy
data_management.description: Export or delete your local data.

modal.title: Export Data
modal.text: This will download a JSON file of all your logs and progress.

modal.title: Delete Account?
modal.text: This is permanent. All your local logs will be erased.

today_focus.title: Today's Focus
today_focus.journal_prompt: How are you feeling about your progress today?

wellness.title: Sleep & Activity
wellness.no_data: No sleep or activity data logged yet.

insights.title: Aman's Analysis
insights.error: Could not generate insights right now.

mood_chart.no_data: Log your mood daily to see trends.

programs.title: Recovery Programs
programs.subtitle: 90-day structured paths built on clinical evidence.

login_prompt.title: Registration Required
login_prompt.text: Please create a profile or log in to enroll in a structured recovery program.

modal.title: Enrollment
modal.text: Start {programName}? This resets your day count.

donate.title: Support our Mission
donate.text: We are a non-profit. A small donation keeps us free for everyone.

certificate_display.title: Recognition Earned
certificate_display.text: Thank you for your kindness. You can download your certificate below.

live_talk.title: Live Voice Chat
live_talk.subtitle: Speak directly with Aman AI for real-time support and grounding.
live_talk.error_mic: Microphone access is required for Live Talk.

toolkit.title: AI Toolkit
toolkit.subtitle: Interactive exercises for mental clarity and stability.
toolkit.error: AI could not generate this tool right now.

breathing.title: Breathing Guide
breathing.description: Slow down and center yourself with guided breathing cycles.

meditation.title: Guided Meditation
meditation.description: Generate a custom meditation script based on your current state.
meditation.placeholder: How are you feeling right now? (e.g., anxious, restless, tired)

cbt.title: CBT Thought Reframer
cbt.description: Break down and reframe negative thought patterns.
cbt.placeholder: Enter a negative thought you're having...

gratitude.title: Gratitude Journaling
gratitude.description: A unique prompt to help you find the positive in your day.

nutrition_navigator.title: Nutrition Guide
nutrition_navigator.description: Actionable meal ideas and tips for physical recovery.
nutrition_navigator.placeholder: What are your health goals or dietary needs?

echoes_of_strength.title: Echoes of Strength
echoes_of_strength.description: Turn your personal affirmations into spoken words of power.
echoes_of_strength.placeholder: Enter an affirmation (e.g., 'I am stronger than my cravings')

future_self_visualization.title: Future Visualization
future_self_visualization.description: A guided audio meditation focusing on your long-term success.
future_self_visualization.placeholder: Describe one goal you've achieved in your future...

prevention_plan_page.title: Relapse Prevention Plan
prevention_plan_page.subtitle: Your digital safety net. Speak with Aman AI to build your personalized plan.
prevention_plan_page.initial_greeting: Let's build your safety net. Why is recovery important to you today?

sober_circle_page.title: Sober Circle
sober_circle_page.subtitle: Discover safe spaces and sober-friendly activities in your community.
sober_circle_page.placeholder: What are you looking for? (e.g., coffee shops, hiking trails, libraries)
sober_circle_page.location_denied: Location access denied. Please enable location to find nearby places.
sober_circle_page.error: Search failed. Please check your connection.

conversation_practice.title: Conversation Lab
conversation_practice.subtitle: Practice difficult real-world conversations in a safe, AI-guided environment.

group_session.title: Group Sessions
group_session.subtitle: Participate in anonymous, AI-moderated support circles.
group_session.disclaimer: This is a simulated group session for support and reflection.
group_session.placeholder: Share your thoughts with the group...

gratitude.title: Practicing Gratitude
gratitude.description: Discussing things we are thankful for in recovery.
gratitude.initial_message: Welcome everyone. Today we're sharing one thing we're grateful for today, no matter how small. Who would like to start?

celebrating_wins.title: Celebrating Wins
celebrating_wins.initial_message: Let's celebrate our progress! Share a recent win you've had in your journey. We're here to cheer you on.

navigating_cravings.title: Managing Cravings
navigating_cravings.description: Sharing strategies for handling difficult moments.
navigating_cravings.initial_message: Cravings are a natural part of the journey. What's a strategy that has helped you stay grounded recently?

managing_stress.title: Stress & Wellness
managing_stress.description: Tips for emotional balance and health.
managing_stress.initial_message: Stress can be a major trigger. How are you taking care of your mental health today?

chatbot.title: Aman Support
chatbot.subtitle: Your private AI companion
chatbot.initial_message: Hello. I'm Aman. How are you feeling on your journey today?
chatbot.error_message: I'm having trouble connecting right now. Please try again soon.
chatbot.crisis_confirm: I can help guide you to professional resources. Should we look at crisis helplines?

gemini.daily_focus_fallback: Today is a new opportunity to grow. Focus on your breath and stay present.

certificate.title: CERTIFICATE OF KINDNESS
certificate.recognition_text: for contributing {amount} via {method} to help make global mental health support free for everyone.
